intro.title: City of Whispers
intro.description: "City of Whispers" is a dark nonlinear text adventure game where a living city turns people's fears, desires, and mistakes into reality. You play a person that does not have something special. Every choice you make changes the streets, destinies, and laws of the world. There are no right paths: only consequences that cannot be predicted.

content.about_text: This is the main text of the site. You can write articles, blocks, information, anything here.
content.section2_text: The next content block. All scrolling down hides the intro and opens text sections.
content.section3_text: You can add lots of text, images, cards, everything you need.
